identity_upgrade_claims_anon_registered_.name: identity_upgrade_claims_anon_registered_unique
identity_upgrade_claims_anon_registered_.where: "identity_upgrade_claims"."anon_user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "identity_upgrade_claims"."registered_user_id" IS NOT NULL

invoices_org_number_unique_idx.name: invoices_org_number_unique_idx
invoices_org_number_unique_idx.where: "invoices"."invoice_number" IS NOT NULL AND "invoices"."deleted_at" IS NULL

owner_check.name: owner_check
owner_check.value: ("addresses"."organization_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("addresses"."user_id" IS NOT NULL)
